title: Hexapod Robot
desc: A six-legged walking robot powered by servos and 3D-printed parts!
fullDesc: Build a fully articulated six-legged hexapod robot from scratch. Each leg uses 3 servo motors for realistic walking gaits. The body and legs are 3D-printed, and the brain is an Arduino Mega controlling 18 servos simultaneously. Program different walking patterns — forward, backward, turning, and even dancing! This project combines mechanical engineering, 3D printing, electronics, and programming into one epic build.
author: Tinkering Lab
